history.title: Project scaffolding and repo structure
history.commit_message:
feat(scaffold): project scaffolding and repo structure for Day 1

- README with business framing, 14-day roadmap, tech stack, and layout
- requirements.txt covering ML, interpretability, tracking, and dev tools
- .gitignore extended with data/, models/, mlruns/, IDE, and cache dirs
- pyproject.toml with black, ruff, and mypy configuration
- src/ package skeleton: data, features, models, evaluation, utils
- configs/config.yaml with paths, data splits, model defaults, and cost matrix
- tests/conftest.py with session-scoped repo_root and config_path fixtures
- Makefile targets: install, format, lint, test, app, clean
- MIT LICENSE

history.title: Data acquisition and schema validation
history.commit_message:
feat(data): add acquisition pipeline, pydantic schema, and validation

- src/data/load.py: download_telco_data() with multi-URL fallback and
  idempotent skip; load_raw() forces TotalCharges as str to preserve
  blank-string rows
- src/data/schema.py: TelcoCustomerRaw pydantic model with field
  validators; EXPECTED_COLUMNS and allowed-value frozensets for all
  categoricals
- src/data/validate.py: validate_dataframe() checks column presence,
  dtypes, nulls, numeric ranges, and categorical cardinality; returns
  ValidationResult with .is_valid/.raise_on_error()
- data/README.md: dataset description, column reference table, source,
  license, and three download options
- configs/config.yaml: add download_urls list, n_rows/n_cols_expected,
  and raw_dir path
- .gitignore: switch data/raw/ and data/processed/ to glob patterns so
  .gitkeep stubs are tracked
- requirements.txt: pin requests>=2.32 as an explicit dependency
